items.prompt: Did you make it to your morning lecture?
items.answer: I sat near the front today.

items.prompt: Are you free for coffee this afternoon?
items.answer: I finish my classes at three.

items.prompt: Have you seen the new study lounge yet?
items.answer: The chairs near the windows are comfortable.

items.prompt: I heard the bookstore got a new shipment.
items.answer: Does it carry the chemistry workbook?

items.prompt: Your advisor stopped by the office earlier.
items.answer: She wanted to know whether the morning seminar still had open space.

items.prompt: Why are you skipping the gym this evening?
items.answer: I have not recovered from yesterday's run.

items.prompt: What did the librarian tell you about renewals?
items.answer: The books are due back next Monday.

items.prompt: How did the group project meeting go?
items.answer: We chose the topic that excites everyone.

items.prompt: You should sign up for the campus tour soon.
items.answer: Where do I add my name?

items.prompt: Did you manage to reach the registration office?
items.answer: They confirmed the late elective that I had added was finally approved.

items.prompt: Did you ever get the bike fixed?
items.answer: The shop replaced both worn tires.

items.prompt: Are you joining us at the food trucks?
items.answer: I already grabbed a quick lunch.

items.prompt: How was the visit to the writing center?
items.answer: The tutor reviewed my whole rough introduction quite carefully.

items.prompt: I think the deadline shifted again this week.
items.answer: When is the revised draft due?

items.prompt: Your roommate seemed confused about the schedule.
items.answer: He asked when the labs usually open.

items.prompt: Why did you switch dorms this semester?
items.answer: The old room never got enough sunlight.

items.prompt: What did Mariana ask after the lecture?
items.answer: She wondered whether I had saved the slides from the seminar.

items.prompt: Have you tried the coffee at the new cafe?
items.answer: It tastes much smoother than the old machine ever did.

items.prompt: Did you hear back from the records office?
items.answer: My missing grade was finally corrected this morning.

items.prompt: You mentioned a problem with your meal card.
items.answer: Where can I get a replacement printed?
